# ona_group_membership (List Resource)

Lists service-account memberships in an Ona group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_group_membership" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
  config { group_id = "<group-id>" }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) Group ID whose memberships are queried.

### Optional

- `search` (String) Search member names and IDs.
